No.2023-38642
兹批准以下企业使用相应认证标志，批准范围仅为以下证书涵盖内容，批
复图案中无关此证书的内容不在批准范围内，请获证企业遵照相关法律法规执
行。如所涉及的认证证书失效，则本批准书同时失效。
WE HEREBY AUTHORIZE THE FOLLOWING ORGANIZATION TO USE RELEVANT
CERTIFICATION MARK. IT IS ONLY THE AREAS COVERED BY FOLLOWING CERTIFICATE ARE
AUTHORIZED. THE IRRELEVANT CONTENT OF THE APPROVED DESIGNS CAN NOT BE
AUTHORIZED. THE CERTIFIED ORGANIZATIONS SHOULD BE SUBJECT TO THE RELEVANT
LAWS AND REGULATIONS. IF THE RELEVANT CERTIFICATE EXPIRES, THE APPROVAL
AUTOMATICALLY EXPIRES.
企业名称/ORGANIZATION NAME：
中国长城科技集团股份有限公司
证书编号：
CQC23701388747,CQC23701389266
标志类型:节能
标志制作形式:印刷
标志设计图须严格遵守《产品认证标识（标志）通用要求》
The drawing of CQC mark must comply with General Requirements for Product
Certification Marks (Labels)
发证日期/APPLICATION DATE：2023-06-01
主 任：
